_comment: [IT version: cowork_domains.example.it.json] Copy this file to cowork_domains.json (at the project root, OUTSIDE git) and fill it in with your real data. Each top-level key = one domain/project. You can have more than one; the one with default:true is used when you don't pass --domain.

_schema.api_url: URL of core/tasks.php on your server, WITHOUT querystring (e.g. https://yoursite.com/cowork/tasks.php)
_schema.api_token: The same token you put in AUTH_TOKEN inside core/tasks.php
_schema.default: true = this domain is used if you don't specify --domain

content._comment: Free-form section: put here the conventions of YOUR automation (language, tone, formats, rules). CLAUDE.md reads and applies it: it's not a fixed schema, adapt it to your case.
content.notes: e.g. free-form instructions you want Claude to always follow for this domain
Minimal example: describe here, in natural language, how you want Claude to behave for this domain's tasks.
